'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 124''' was the one hundred twenty-fourth issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[May 12]], [[2004]]. It was authored by [[Andrew Darling]], [[Chris Gardner]], [[Matthew Harvey]] and [[Iain Lowson]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*[[Empire 2|Imperial Betrayal]]
*[[Weequay/Legends|Weequay]]
*[[Kyle Katarn]] ([[Sulon/Legends|Sulon]])
*[[Kouhun/Legends|Kouhuns]]
*[[Durga Besadii Tai|Durga the Hutt]]
*[[Tor Vizsla|Vizsla]]
*[[Pantolomin/Legends|Pantolomin]]
*[[LE-BO2D9|LEEBO (LE-BO2D9)]]
*[[Portable scanner/Legends|Portable Scanner]]
*[[Hound's Tooth/Legends|''Hound's Tooth'']]
